text:
The Legend of Kage is this week’s Console Archives on Nintendo Switch 2

Hamster just confirmed its latest Console Archives game for Nintendo Switch 2, which is The Legend of Kage. It arrives tomorrow, June 18. Taito initially dropped The Legend of Kage in 1986. The 8-bit action game has players entering the demon realm to rescue Kirihime, who’s been kidnapped. Here’s some additional information: The Legend of Kage was released by Taito...

text:
EA Sports FC 26 is Europe’s next Nintendo Switch Online Game Trial on Switch 2, Switch

Nintendo announced its latest Switch Online Game Trial in Europe today, which is for EA Sports FC 26. The offer is planned for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch starting tomorrow, lasting until June 24. During the event, the game will be fully playable at no extra cost for those who have an active membership. Everything is accessible and progress...

text:

Pokemon Champions has received its latest update, and the game is now at version 1.1.0. If you’ve been keeping up with news about the game, you know that today marks the start of Regulation Set M-B. As part of this, the latest set of Pokemon have been added to the game. The title also has its official mobile launch today....

It’s coming to Nintendo Switch in the future – a release date wasn’t provided, but will be shared soon. Similar to other G-Mode Archives titles, this is intended to replicate the version previously released for Japanese flip phones. Still, it will retain...

text:

As revealed by a Nintendo eShop listing, GD Studio is about to put Whisper of the House on Nintendo Switch. The game will be available later today as a digital download. text:

My Little Puppy saw a digital-only launch on Nintendo Switch when it debuted a couple of weeks ago, but a physical release has now been revealed for Asia. Fans can choose between a standard copy and a deluxe edition. With the latter, you’ll get a double sided photo card, handkerchief, mini stickers, a plush corgi charm, an art book, and...

text:

To celebrate the launch of Solarpunk, Rokaplay and Cyberwave readied a launch trailer. We saw the peaceful survival adventure title on Nintendo Switch this week. Here’s an overview with more details about the game: Set high above the clouds in a vibrant world of floating islands, Solarpunk invites players to build a peaceful life powered entirely by renewable energy. author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo issues statement about recent data breach

Nintendo issued an official statement following reports yesterday that the company was impacted by a data breach. For those that missed the news, SHADOWBYT3$ said it obtained 859MB of Nintendo employee data through TinyPulse. Employee names, bank statements, employee IDs and reports, analytics, and more were said to be affected. With today’s statement, Nintendo confirms that a breach took place....

The post Nintendo issues statement about recent data breach appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:

text:

text:
Teaknights announced for Nintendo Switch

The developer Funky Can Creative has announced that its new game, Teaknights, is heading to Nintendo Switch, though a release window has not yet been shared. text:
Tomo: Endless Blue coming to Nintendo Switch 2

Onibi plans on bringing Tomo: Endless Blue to Nintendo Switch 2, the studio just announced. The game will announce launch timing later. Tomo: Endless Blue is a living-world creature-collecting RPG set in a voxel open world.
